{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221941458B92000AD98F8B8FB23C"}"},"total":163},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7606368112239575832","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我感觉最让人舒服的是，学霸的书你就算是二刷三刷也不会感觉无聊，反而会越看越好看，就比如迪卡和齐力"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770999016,"group_id":"7591439880274578494","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1728852163050167"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7591439880274578494","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"131"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":34039,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":34266,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7606369816103240472","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"老好看了，学霸文笔一向不错，看着会感觉很幽默，故事情节也有起伏"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770998784,"group_id":"7591439880274578494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7s8kH/iL7jHOZc/Dcv30R5eHjGadf0JpNKvUQdWbM/I","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0ca083ed7faf4fa294309ad97171788c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706899&x-signature=3F4G%2BMrO5XEOvFVYxCZqL8xcqbw%3D","user_id":"1728852163050167","user_name":"智多多（孤单寂寞版"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1728852163050167","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7591439880274578494","book_info":{"abstract":"夏恪穿越到了一个被黑暗所统治的奥特世界，奥剧中的各个反派创立了各种黑暗帝国瓜分了整个宇宙，光之战士们只能躲在角落里艰难求生。
依次被异生兽袭击的意外，让他成为了奈克瑟斯的新一任适能者，还顺带觉醒了系统。
有系统是好事，问题是，我一个奥特曼，你给我【厨神系统】是几个意思？
我做美食就能变强？
没错，我做美食真能变强！
ps.无女主。
（由于非奥剧世界观，部分奥人设与原剧可能存在表面上的不符，介意慎点，谢谢！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/34fc48871cb85b7ddbcf9a71b9ef260a","author":"光之学霸","author_id":"","book_id":"7591439880274578494","book_name":"刚变奈克瑟斯，你告诉我诺亚挂了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7591439934259479102","read_count":"13667","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"338981"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"152","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,奥特同人,系统,美食,穿越,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f16330157bc6b26760460699b08ebe9d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363705&x-signature=G7NmPO%2Fqk%2Byj%2FRP9zquWg8zEBIo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3996859282","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"131"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221941458B92000AD98F8B8FB23C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":34039,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":34254,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3407},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606369263084225304","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是在我心目中近两年来看过奥文里排名最靠前的一本，各类设定都很戳我啊：平成一家、高智商赛罗、黑暗宇宙、身份反转……各类梗也恰到好处，剧情推得飞起，真的给我看爽了。最近的奥文或多或少都有问题，要么有奥特精神但文笔烂，要么有点文青病剧情逻辑崩坏（女性向），要么龙傲天烂梗一堆（男性向），但本书做到了“取其精华去其糟粕”，有男性向的剧情严谨战斗爽，也有女性向的设定带感与人物塑造。最重要的是主角真的很有奥特精神，正义感适能者谁不爱呢？（而且我是个奈厨），真的太合我的口味了！！
最后给作者提点小建议：一是打斗场面还可以写地更燃，二是场景氛围可以渲染地更到位（比如迪迦变闪耀的那段，感觉还是不够过瘾）反正希望作者继续加油，我还挺期待后续剧情的，尤其是原本世界下课和迪迦的内容
（PS：我就说文笔怎么这么好，原来不是新手是学霸啊[奸笑]）","text_exts":[{"e":45,"s":42,"text":"高智商","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%AB%98%E6%99%BA%E5%95%86&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741797058B8FB23C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227606369263084225304%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227591439880274578494%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%AB%98%E6%99%BA%E5%95%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":133,"s":130,"text":"龙傲天","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741797058B8FB23C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227606369263084225304%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227591439880274578494%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":172,"s":169,"text":"战斗爽","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%88%98%E6%96%97%E7%88%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741797058B8FB23C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227606369263084225304%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227591439880274578494%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%88%98%E6%96%97%E7%88%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770998575,"group_id":"7591439880274578494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个特摄厨～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2aDxOKfG p_read_item_cnt":"105"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221941458B92000AD98F8B8FB23C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":45,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10774,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4654},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613779138609333017","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看啊，我很喜欢老师对主角们的塑造，每一个都有各自的特点,完全就是塑造出了有血有肉的人物，我是先看的齐力那一本。我在追本书的同时，也在补迪卡的那一本。我感觉老师的文笔是越来越好了。每天放学回家写完作业就听老师的小说带着开心睡觉真的很棒的！时不时就听到一些梗就笑了。文笔真的很好啊！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772724042,"group_id":"7591439880274578494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7oADFqFxqkNSOS7DgqD1hxx0cfqYWvGJynkk6ksJAAw","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ea81cd4adc0f479fb80a31e34dc2f074~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707169&x-signature=zirb9tyUOad%2FD2Q94nmOE30Wnm4%3D","user_id":"2816326649783095","user_name":"玩不到第五的苦命人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2816326649783095","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7591439880274578494","book_info":{"abstract":"夏恪穿越到了一个被黑暗所统治的奥特世界，奥剧中的各个反派创立了各种黑暗帝国瓜分了整个宇宙，光之战士们只能躲在角落里艰难求生。
